Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Blowing
Fields.Description: Correction value when blowing off

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Physical
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiplier by multiplying the basic physical attack power

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Magic
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiply the magic attack power (in the case of a bow, correct the missile)

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Fire
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiply the fire attack power (in the case of a bow, correct the missile)

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Lightning
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiplier for electric shock attack power (in the case of a bow, correct the missile)

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Stamina
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiplier for stamina attack power

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Guard Attack Rate
Fields.Description: PC only. 1 only

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Guard Break
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiplying the base value by the repelling of the attack

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Throw Escape
Fields.Description: Weapon correction value for throw-through attacks

Fields.Name: Conditional Category [1]
Fields.Description: Subcategory 1

Fields.Name: Conditional Category [2]
Fields.Description: Subcategory 2

Fields.Name: Damage: Physical
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Basic damage of physical attack

Fields.Name: Damage: Magic
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Additional damage from magic attacks

Fields.Name: Damage: Fire
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Additional damage from fire attacks

Fields.Name: Damage: Lightning
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Additional damage from electric shock attacks

Fields.Name: Damage: Stamina
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Amount of damage to enemy (player) stamina

Fields.Name: Damage: Guard Attack Rate
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Flick value

Fields.Name: Damage: Guard Break Rate
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Value used to determine if an attack is repelled

Fields.Name: Is Considered Special Attack for Asset Destruction
Fields.Description: Do you want to calculate damage for assets that are Break due to bush damage? To set. : Calculate, : Do not calculate (that is, you cannot inflict damage) [GR] SEQ20617

Fields.Name: Damage: Throw Escape
Fields.Description: Throw-through attack power

Fields.Name: Damage: Object
Fields.Description: Attack power against OBJ

Fields.Name: Guard Cut Stamina Rate
Fields.Description: Correct the [stamina cut rate when guarding] set in the weapon parameter and NPC parameter.

Fields.Name: Guard Rate
Fields.Description: NPC, the guard performance set in the weapon parameter is uniformly corrected. 0, 1x / 100, 2x / -100, guard multiplier = (guard multiplier / 100) to increase / decrease the parameter to 0. + 1)

Fields.Name: Throw Type ID
Fields.Description: ID associated with the throw parameter

Fields.Name: Damage Level
Fields.Description: Which damage motion should be played against the enemy when attacking? To decide.

Fields.Name: Map Hit Type
Fields.Description: Which map do you see around the attack? The set

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Bypass Rate
Fields.Description: Guard cut rate invalidation ratio (-100 to 100)  Normal at 0 / Completely invalidated at -100 / Doubles the defense effect of the opponent at 100  -50, 100% cut shield becomes 50% cut Become

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Physical attributes to set for attacks

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to set for attacks

Fields.Name: Attack Type
Fields.Description: Specify SFX / SE at the time of attack (1 set by attribute, material, size)

Fields.Name: Attack Material
Fields.Description: Specify SFX / SE at the time of attack (1 set by attribute, material, size)

Fields.Name: Guard Range Type
Fields.Description: Guard judgment position

Fields.Name: Defence SE Material
Fields.Description: Used for SE when guarding 1

Fields.Name: Hit Source Type
Fields.Description: Where do you get the Damipoli ID per attack? To specify

Fields.Name: Throw Flag
Fields.Description: Flag used for throwing information

Fields.Name: Disable Guard
Fields.Description: If 1, ignore the guard on the guard side and enter the damage level

Fields.Name: Disable Stamina Attack
Fields.Description: Destruction judgment is performed by stamina attack power, but stamina is not actually reduced.

Fields.Name: Disable Hit SpEffect
Fields.Description: Disables special effects when an attack hits. SCE bug countermeasures

Fields.Name: Disable Missed Attack Notification For AI
Fields.Description: Do not notify AI of missed swing

Fields.Name: Repeat Hit Sound FX
Fields.Description: Enemy only: Does SFX occur continuously when hitting a wall?

Fields.Name: Is Physical Projectile
Fields.Description: Used for site damage judgment.

Fields.Name: Is Attack By Ghost
Fields.Description: Used for determining spirit damage.

Fields.Name: Disable No Damage
Fields.Description: Ignore invincible effects such as steps, TAE's complete invincibility cannot be ignored.

Fields.Name: Attack Power - SFX Effect
Fields.Description: Attack strength [SFX]

Fields.Name: Attack Direction - SFX Effect
Fields.Description: Attack direction [SFX]

Fields.Name: Oppose Target
Fields.Description: Target:  Hostile

Fields.Name: Friendly Target
Fields.Description: Target:  Allies

Fields.Name: Self Target
Fields.Description: Target: myself

Fields.Name: Is Target Hit Through Door
Fields.Description: Whether to check the door penetration. In the case of , it is judged whether or not the target through the door can be attacked.

Fields.Name: Is Ride Special Attack
Fields.Description: If you hit the target of the riding special attack while riding, the SA damage will be multiplied by the multiplier.

Fields.Name: Is Base Attack Added
Fields.Description: Do you refer to the additional attack power even in weapon attacks?

Fields.Name: Is Excluded from Threat Level Notification
Fields.Description: Is it excluded from threat level notification?

Fields.Name: Attack Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Behavior identification value: Extra large damage transition

Fields.Name: Attack Power - SE Effect
Fields.Description: Attack strength [SE]

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Value used for SA break calculation formula

Fields.Description: Vibration ID at the time of hit when hit in the middle (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: Hit Rumble ID - Root
Fields.Description: Vibration ID at the time of hit when hitting the root (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: Defence SFX Material [1]
Fields.Description: Used for SFX when guarding. 1

Fields.Name: Defence SE Material [2]
Fields.Description: Used for SE when guarding 2

Fields.Name: Defence SFX Material [2]
Fields.Description: Used for SFX when guarding. 2

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Holy
Fields.Description: PC only. Multiply the dark attack power (in the case of a bow, correct the missile)

Fields.Name: Damage: Holy
Fields.Description: NPCs only. Additional damage from dark attacks

Fields.Name: Is Disable Parry
Fields.Description: This is a flag to disable the new parry control. A process that determines that the damage on the attacking side has been parried when it comes into contact with a character in the parry state on the defending side.

Fields.Name: Is Disable 2H ATK Bonus
Fields.Description: Avoid using the 1.5x growth status adaptation with both hands

Fields.Name: Is Invalidated by No Damage in Air
Fields.Description: If Do you want to penetrate invincibility is , this setting will be ignored.

Fields.Name: Damage Level - Vs. Player
Fields.Description: Damage level to the player. If it is 0 (default), it is not used. The meaning of the range other than 0 (default) is the same as Damage level.

Fields.Name: Status Ailment Correction
Fields.Description: Magnification correction is performed for the abnormal state attack power of special effects.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction - By SpEffect Point
Fields.Description: Magnification correction is performed for the special effect ~ ~ attack power [point].

Fields.Name: Attack Correction - By SpEffect Power
Fields.Description: Magnification is corrected for the special effect's attack power multiplier.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction - By SpEffect Damage
Fields.Description: Attack side of special effect: ~ ~ Performs magnification correction for damage multiplier.

Fields.Name: Attack Behavior ID [2]
Fields.Description: Behavior identification value: Plays damage motion only at specific times

Fields.Name: Throw Damage Attribute
Fields.Description: Attribute of throw damage of attack judgment. Corresponding special effects will be applied. It works only when the attack ATK_PATAM_THROWFLAG_TYPE is 2: Throw.

Fields.Name: Status Ailment Correction - By Point
Fields.Description: Magnification correction is performed for the special effect Whether to apply the abnormal state attack power magnification correction.

Fields.Name: Attack Element Correct ID
Fields.Description: For overwriting the ID of the parameter that corrects the attack attribute

Fields.Name: Decal Base ID [1]
Fields.Description: Decal identifier 1 (3 digits)

Fields.Name: Decal Base ID [2]
Fields.Description: Decal identifier 2 (3 digits)

Fields.Name: Weapon HP Regain Amount Scale
Fields.Description: Weapon regain amount correction value

Fields.Name: Attack HP Regain Amount
Fields.Description: Amount of attack regain

Fields.Name: HP Regain Time Scale
Fields.Description: Regainable time correction factor

Fields.Name: HP Regain Rate Scale
Fields.Description: Regainable rate correction factor

Fields.Name: Same Attack Judgment ID
Fields.Description: Same attack judgment ID

Fields.Name: Special Attribute VFX Variation Offset
Fields.Description: Value for giving variation to SFX and SE generated by special attribute in combination with special attribute (SEQ16473)

Fields.Name: Parry Forward Offset
Fields.Description: Front angle offset of [collapsed side] of parry establishment condition

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Poise
Fields.Description: PC only. Correction value to be applied to the [basic value] set for the weapon

Fields.Name: Defence SFX Material Variation Offset
Fields.Description: A value to have variations of damage SFX and SE in combination with defense material 1 or 2 used when guarding. (SEQ16473)

Fields.Name: Special Attribute for Magic Cocktail
Fields.Description: Override for purposes of Magic Cocktail affinity residue

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Ultimate Art
Fields.Description: The correction for ultimate art gauge charge.

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise - Deflected
Fields.Description: Poise damage to self when this attack is deflected.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Revive
Fields.Description: The correction for revive damage.

Fields.Name: Damage: Revive
Fields.Description: Flat amount of revive damage.
